items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Connects squared error, cross-entropy, and log-likelihood in a unified probabilistic view of supervised learning.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Covers loss functions, empirical risk minimization, and regression vs classification objectives.

items.title: PyTorch loss functions documentation
items.author: PyTorch Developers
items.note: API reference for MSELoss, L1Loss (MAE), BCEWithLogitsLoss, and CrossEntropyLoss.

items.title: scikit-learn metrics: mean_squared_error, mean_absolute_error, log_loss
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Practical implementations of regression and classification loss/metric computations.
